goals: Consolidate or clean documentation without changing application behavior.
Remove optimistic or stale claims unless they are verified.
Keep link and navigation updates bounded and reviewable.
must_run: Manually verify changed links and referenced paths.
If API docs were changed, run: cd backend && pytest tests/test_openapi_contract.py -q
If UI behavior claims were changed, run the closest targeted frontend test.
required_artifacts: list of removed or downgraded claims
verification commands or manual checks used
stop_conditions: Cleaning docs requires protected code changes.
The work expands into repo-wide documentation restructuring beyond budget.
Key claims cannot be verified from code or tests.
review_notes: Prefer accurate partial status over legacy success language.
If evidence is missing, say so explicitly in the docs.
